feedback.text: As an EU citizen, I urge the future European Digital Fairness Act to explicitly include digital video games under its protections. In todays digital landscape, many consumers pay for games that exist only online, yet they risk losing access entirely when corporations decide to shut down servers or delist titles. This practice effectively erases purchased content and undermines the principle of digital ownership. To ensure fairness in the digital economy, the Act should prevent large corporations from unilaterally removing or discontinuing access to games that individuals have paid forpreserving both consumer rights and digital cultural heritage.
